name: image
description: Enhanced image component with aspect ratio presets, loading indicator, error fallback, overlay, and long-press full-screen preview.

props.name: source
props.description: Image source — a URI object or local require().

props.name: aspectRatio
props.description: Aspect ratio preset applied to the image container.

props.name: fit
props.description: How the image fits within its container (maps to resizeMode).

props.name: borderRadius
props.description: Border radius preset from the theme radius tokens.

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset controlling the width and height of the image.

props.name: showLoader
props.description: When true, displays an activity indicator while the image is loading.

props.name: fallback
props.description: Custom component rendered when the image fails to load.

props.name: errorMessage
props.description: Error text shown when the image fails to load and no fallback is provided.

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the image container.

props.name: overlay
props.description: When true, renders a gradient overlay on top of the image.

props.name: overlayColors
props.description: Tuple of [from, to] colors for the overlay gradient.

props.name: enablePreview
props.description: When true, a long-press opens a full-screen preview; releasing dismisses it.
